title: Demo to Alpha
description: Turn a demo into a repeatable engineering prototype with a visible architecture boundary and reproducible core workflow.
phaseTargets: discover runnable entrypoints and core workflow
add repeatable install, run, and validation commands
architectureCriteria: core modules and runtime entrypoints are identifiable
demo-only scripts are separated from product code
state and configuration locations are explicit
runtimeCriteria: project installs from a clean checkout
core workflow runs with documented commands
basic tests or checks execute without manual UI-only steps
releaseCriteria: known gaps are listed as blockers or next actions
final report states whether alpha readiness was reached
